companyNameJapanese: 蘇州華興源創科技股份有限公司
description: China's first company listed on the Shanghai STAR Market (科创板) in 2019. Leading flat panel display (FPD) inspection equipment maker with 32% AMOLED Cell/Module inspection market share in China. Expanding into semiconductor test equipment: self-developed T7600 SoC test machine comparable to Teradyne J750 series. Products: FPD inspection systems, SoC/memory test machines (ATE), BMS testers, and sorters (handler equipment). Revenue FY2024: ~1.86B CNY.

competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - adjacent competition in semiconductor test ecosystem
Changchuan Technology (CMP-0087) - domestic semiconductor test equipment competitor
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap ~14.6B CNY (~306B JPY). Stock price ~32.79 CNY (Jan 2026). Historic significance as STAR Market company #001. T7600 SoC tester broke monopoly of US/Japan makers in SOC chip testing. Key customer Samsung for test machines. 2025 Q1-Q3 revenue: 1.579B CNY (+23.7% YoY), net profit 152M CNY (swing from loss to profit). Expanding from FPD inspection (core business) into semiconductor testing as second growth engine. Not a direct competitor to ACCRETECH's probing/dicing/CMP products, but operates in adjacent semiconductor test equipment space.

_metadata.dataSource: Investing.com, SSE, Sina Finance, company website, industry reports, Chinese language sources
